name: ReturnEnquiries
description: Customer needs to return Virgin Media equipment — they may be asking how to return it, requesting return packaging or labels, checking whether their return was received, or querying why they've been asked to return equipment. This is about physically sending equipment back to Virgin Media.

sampleUtterances.utterance: How do I return my {returnProductType} ?
I need to send back my {returnProductType}
Can you send me a return label for my {returnProductType} ?
I need return packaging to send my equipment back
Where do I send my old {returnProductType} ?
I've been asked to return my {returnProductType} but I've already sent it back
Can you confirm you received my returned {returnProductType} ?
I returned my {returnProductType} weeks ago but I'm still being chased for it
What equipment do I need to return?
I've been told to return equipment that I don't have
How long do I have to return my {returnProductType} ?
Do I need to return the {returnProductType} or can I keep it?
I want to arrange the return of my old {returnProductType}
The return bag hasn't arrived — how do I send my equipment back?
I've got a new {returnProductType} but haven't been told what to do with the old one
Am I going to be charged if I don't return the {returnProductType} ?
I can't find a prepaid label in the packaging I was sent
I've already sent my {returnProductType} back — can you check it was received?
What's the address for returning equipment?
I was supposed to get a return bag but nothing arrived
I need to return equipment after cancelling my account
return my {returnProductType}
